message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Dot (matrix multiplication)

Adds 17 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Vector dot product: basic, zeros, orthogonal, parallel, unit vectors
- Matrix-vector multiplication
- Matrix-matrix multiplication: identity, zero matrices
- Rectangular matrices: [2,3] @ [3,2]
- Row/column vector multiplication
- Mathematical properties: commutativity, distributivity, scalar mult
- Larger matrices: 3x3 @ 3x3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
